rubrics: The response operates in MODE A (bilateral analysis) with both income and cost sides
The response includes income changes from wage increases
The response includes price changes for at least 3 spending categories (groceries, restaurants, retail)
The response computes net purchasing power (income minus costs)
The response uses pass-through rates from published literature with citations
The response includes at least 3 income tiers in the distributional analysis
The response includes geographic variation (at least 2 regions)
Each finding has a confidence level
